calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion For Award Of Atty'S Fees
Off Calendar Feb-02-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s, dba Great Western Collection Bureau, motion for an award of attorney fees.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
No appearance by defendant Jeffrey M. Branco, Individually as Guarantor of Paired Wines & Spirits, Inc., dba Coit Liquor.

After reviewing plaintiff's motion, and good cause appearing, it is hereby Ordered that defendant Jeffrey M. Branco, Individually as Guarantor of Paired Wines & Spirits, Inc., dba Coit Liquor, shall pay plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau, the sum of $2,800.00 as reasonable attorney fees against defendant.

Order granted plaintiff's motion for attorney fees was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-15-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Scott Hughes, #12365.

Robert Resner, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
Garry Looney, President of Creditors Trade Association, Inc., was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Jeffrey M. Branco, individually as guarantor of Paired Wines & Spirits, Inc., dba Coit Liquor.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Linda G. Cooper, individually as guarantor of Paired Wines & Spirits, Inc., dba Coit Liquor, was filed September 9, 2009.
Default as to defendant Jeffrey M. Branco, individually as guarantor of Paired Wines & Spirits, Inc., dba Coit Liquor, was entered on August 26, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, December 15, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau, and against the Defaulted Defendant Jeffrey M. Branco, individually as guarantor of Paired Wines & Spirits, Inc., dba Coit Liquor, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $27,051.03.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,099.22.
Attorney's Fees - Reserved.
Costs - $365.00.

Total - $29,515.25.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2009 Continued To Jan-22-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
